name: Kenorland Minerals Ltd.
description: Kenorland Minerals Ltd. is a Vancouver-based project generator and grassroots mineral exploration company holding over 400,000 hectares across premier North American jurisdictions, with a focus on precious metals discovery. The company's flagship asset is a 4% NSR royalty on the Frotet Project in Quebec, operated by partner and strategic shareholder Sumitomo Metal Mining Canada Ltd., which hosts the Regnault gold system — a greenfields discovery made jointly by Kenorland and Sumitomo. Kenorland's project generator model leverages partnerships with major and mid-tier miners, including Centerra Gold, to fund exploration while retaining royalty interests and equity upside.
